event: Oakland Roots SC confirmed it will not return to the Oakland Coliseum as its home venue for the 2027 season, with no alternative venue yet secured.
Oakland Roots proposed an 8,000-seat modular stadium at their Alameda training facility as an interim 2027 home while pursuing Howard Terminal for a permanent venue.
FC Naples parted ways with inaugural head coach Matt Poland and appointed Zak Gordon as interim head coach for the remainder of the 2026 USL League One season.
Richmond Kickers earned their first win under interim head coach Brian Ownby, defeating Greenville Triumph SC 2-1 in the USL Cup behind seven saves from goalkeeper James Sneddon.
Richmond Kickers operating under second interim head coach of the 2026 season after parting with Darren Sawatzky mid-season in June.
Greenville Triumph SC lost 1-2 to Richmond Kickers in the USL Cup.
Tampa Bay Rowdies lead the Eastern Conference with 31 points from 15 games and a +12 goal differential at the season's midpoint.
Charleston Battery sit second in the Eastern Conference with 26 points and a +9 goal differential, capping an undefeated league month on the back of five goal contributions from a key midfielder.
Defending champion Pittsburgh Riverhounds sit sixth in the Eastern Conference with 20 points from 13 games, currently outside an automatic top-four position.
Sporting Club Jacksonville, in their expansion debut season, sit last in the Eastern Conference with 4 points from 15 games and a -22 goal differential.

Sporting Club Jacksonville submitted an application to join USL Premier at the time of the club's introductory press conference, though its current stadium does not meet the 15,000-seat capacity requirement.
Lionsbridge FC finished the regular season atop the USL League Two Chesapeake Division with 34 points from 14 games and a +32 goal differential, entering the playoffs as the division's top seed.
Fort Wayne FC continues to push toward a historic first-season benchmark with their attack firing, entering Week 20 with a home fixture against defending champion One Knoxville.

Wilton Rancheria and Sacramento Republic FC announced Republic Stadium at The Railyards will be built as a 20,000+ seat soccer-first venue at a cost of approximately $350 million, on track to open in 2028.
North Carolina FC suspended operations after the 2025 season and filed a formal application to join USL Premier in 2028, contingent on securing a minimum 15,000-seat purpose-built stadium in Raleigh.
Pittsburgh Riverhounds SC submitted a USL Premier application centered on expanding FNB Stadium from 5,500 to 15,000 seats as part of a reported $125 million project.
Louisville City FC sit fourth in the Eastern Conference with 24 points from 15 games, level on points with Detroit City FC, as USL Premier applicants aiming to defend playoff contention.
